hooks.command:
python << 'PYEOF'
import sys, json, os
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = ((d.get('tool_input') or {}).get('file_path') or (d.get('tool_response') or {}).get('filePath') or '')
ext = f.rsplit('.',1)[-1].lower() if '.' in f else ''
bn = f.rsplit('/',1)[-1].rsplit('\\',1)[-1]
noise = ('node_modules', 'target', 'dist', '.git', '__pycache__', '.pytest_cache', '.venv')
if any('/'+sd+'/' in f.replace('\\','/') or f.replace('\\','/').startswith(sd+'/') for sd in noise):
    pass
elif ext in ('java','xml','yml','yaml','js','vue','css','py','json','md','sql','html','cfg','ini','txt') or bn in ('Dockerfile','Makefile','.gitignore','.env.example'):
    os.makedirs('.claude', exist_ok=True)
    with open('.claude/.pending-verification', 'w') as m:
        m.write('')
PYEOF
